UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF YUEN, EDWIN AS TO DEFENDANT TONG, PETER WASHINGTON SPORTSWEAR, INC. A CALIF. CORP. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT TONG, PETER WASHINGTON SPORTSWEAR, INC. A CALIF. CORP.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TONG, PETER WASHINGTON SPORTSWEAR, INC. A CALIF. CORP. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2307 FOLSOM STREET, S.F. $3,357.63 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,357.63, STAYED UNTIL AUG-31-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, AT 11:59PM. STAY OF EXECUTION IS ALSO DEPENDENT UPON THE DEFT PAYING $ 1,157.63 PER MONTH FOR 06/01/97 THROUGH AND INCLUDING 08/31/97 IN TRUST TO PLTF'S ATTY "LEW & FONG". BOTH THE PLTF & DEFT MUST COMPLY WITH ALL OF THE OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS AS INDICATED IN THE JUDGMENT.
